scripts.build:package: pnpm --filter @upup/core run build && pnpm --filter @upup/server run build && pnpm --filter @upup/vanilla run build && pnpm --filter @upup/react run build && pnpm --filter @upup/vue run build && pnpm --filter @upup/next run build && pnpm --filter @upup/preact run build && pnpm --filter @upup/solid run build && pnpm --filter @upup/svelte run build && pnpm --filter @upup/qwik run build && pnpm --filter @upup/angular run build
scripts.build:storybook: pnpm run build:storybook:react && pnpm run build:storybook:vue && pnpm run build:storybook:vanilla && pnpm run build:storybook:next && pnpm run build:storybook:preact && pnpm run build:storybook:solid && pnpm run build:storybook:svelte && pnpm run build:storybook:qwik && pnpm run build:storybook:angular && pnpm run build:storybook:hub
scripts.dev: dotenv -e local-dev/.env.ports -- concurrently -k -n apps,packages,storybook "pnpm run dev:apps" "pnpm run dev:package-watch" "pnpm run storybook:open"
scripts.dev:package-watch: pnpm --filter @upup/core run build && pnpm --filter @upup/vanilla run build && concurrently "pnpm --filter @upup/core run dev" "pnpm --filter @upup/server run dev" "pnpm --filter @upup/vanilla run dev" "pnpm --filter @upup/react run dev"
scripts.storybook: concurrently -k -n react,vue,vanilla,next,preact,solid,svelte,qwik,angular,hub "pnpm run storybook:react" "pnpm run storybook:vue" "pnpm run storybook:vanilla" "pnpm run storybook:next" "pnpm run storybook:preact" "pnpm run storybook:solid" "pnpm run storybook:svelte" "pnpm run storybook:qwik" "pnpm run storybook:angular" "wait-on http://localhost:6007/index.json http://localhost:6008/index.json http://localhost:6009/index.json http://localhost:6010/index.json http://localhost:6011/index.json http://localhost:6012/index.json http://localhost:6013/index.json http://localhost:6014/index.json http://localhost:6015/index.json && pnpm run storybook:hub"
scripts.storybook:open: concurrently -k -n react,vue,vanilla,next,preact,solid,svelte,qwik,angular,hub "pnpm run storybook:react" "pnpm run storybook:vue" "pnpm run storybook:vanilla" "pnpm run storybook:next" "pnpm run storybook:preact" "pnpm run storybook:solid" "pnpm run storybook:svelte" "pnpm run storybook:qwik" "pnpm --filter @upup/angular run storybook" "wait-on http://localhost:6007/index.json http://localhost:6008/index.json http://localhost:6009/index.json http://localhost:6010/index.json http://localhost:6011/index.json http://localhost:6012/index.json http://localhost:6013/index.json http://localhost:6014/index.json http://localhost:6015/index.json && pnpm run storybook:hub:open"
scripts.start: pnpm run docs:build && pnpm --filter @upup/landing run start
scripts.release: pnpm --filter @upup/core run release && pnpm --filter @upup/server run release && pnpm --filter @upup/vanilla run release && pnpm --filter @upup/react run release && pnpm --filter @upup/vue run release && pnpm --filter @upup/next run release && pnpm --filter @upup/preact run release && pnpm --filter @upup/solid run release && pnpm --filter @upup/svelte run release && pnpm --filter @upup/qwik run release && pnpm --filter @upup/angular run release
scripts.test-release: pnpm --filter @upup/core run test-release && pnpm --filter @upup/server run test-release && pnpm --filter @upup/vanilla run test-release && pnpm --filter @upup/react run test-release && pnpm --filter @upup/vue run test-release && pnpm --filter @upup/next run test-release && pnpm --filter @upup/preact run test-release && pnpm --filter @upup/solid run test-release && pnpm --filter @upup/svelte run test-release && pnpm --filter @upup/qwik run test-release && pnpm --filter @upup/angular run test-release
